allow: Bash(git add server/storage.ts server/seed.ts && git diff --cached --stat)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix admin role bootstrap and prevent role downgrades on upsert

- Add PLATFORM_ADMIN_EMAILS env var: on every server start, listed emails
  are ensured to have platform-admin role and isActive=1. This allows
  recovering from accidental role downgrades without direct DB access.
- Fix upsertAdminUser: when updating an existing user, preserve their
  current role instead of overwriting it. Role changes must go through
  updateAdminUserRole which enforces audit logging. Prevents the
  bootstrap path from silently downgrading a platform-admin to board-admin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
